name: Michael Gibbs
abstract: Michael Clement Irving Gibbs (born 25 September 1937) is a Rhodesian-born English jazz composer, conductor, arranger and producer as well as a trombonist and keyboardist. He is known for collaborations with vibraphonist Gary Burton, his student, and for his use of rock elements in orchestral jazz.

about_quotes.speaker: Barry Kernfeld
about_quotes.evidence: Michael Gibbs to Pat Metheny, Swallow himself, Carla Bley, and so forth, who have these tunes in The Real Book
about_quotes.doc_title: Barry Kernfeld interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 16, 2020
